title: calceolaria × fruticohybrida
intro: Calceolaria × fruticohybrida, also known as the Fairy Candles or Pocketbook Plant, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the Calceolaria genus. This plant is known for its vibrant, bell-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria × fruticohybrida include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Calceolaria × fruticohybrida can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential and safety as a medicinal herb.
